scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others --success first -n renderer,tsc,agent,electron "pnpm run dev:renderer" "pnpm run dev:electron:tsc" "pnpm run dev:agent-runtime" "pnpm run dev:electron:run"
scripts.dev:electron:run: wait-on tcp:5173 file:dist-electron/main.js && cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 electron dist-electron/main.js
scripts.build: pnpm --dir ../../packages/shared-ipc run build && pnpm --dir ../../packages/emulator-protocol run build && pnpm --dir ../../packages/agent-runtime run build && tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json && vite build
scripts.package: pnpm run build && dotenv -e .env.macos-notarize -- pnpm exec electron-builder --mac --win portable:x64 --publish never
scripts.package:dir: pnpm run build && cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false pnpm exec electron-builder --mac --dir -c.mac.identity=null --publish never
scripts.package:dir:win: pnpm run build && cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false pnpm exec electron-builder --win --dir --publish never
scripts.package:mac: pnpm run build && dotenv -e .env.macos-notarize -- pnpm exec electron-builder --mac --publish never
scripts.package:win: pnpm run build && pnpm exec electron-builder --win portable:x64 --publish never
